source: Android and iOS BlePsFtpClient write acknowledgement timeout planning vector

messageContains: Operation timeout while waiting packets written

commonDecision.errorPolicy: write acknowledgement timeout is a protocol-timeout path distinct from transport transmit failure and peer-side RFC76 response errors

notes: This vector intentionally documents a long-duration timeout path that should not be executed against wall-clock protocol time. Android waits in BlePsFtpClient.waitPacketsWritten until PROTOCOL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, then throws PftpOperationTimeout and maps it through the write flow. iOS waits through AtomicInteger.checkAndWait and surfaces AtomicIntegerException.waitTimeout. KMP migration must add fake-clock or injectable-timeout support before moving PSFTP write acknowledgement orchestration to common code.
